name_cn:
Top-tier replica with full packaging
❤️❤️Oblique Backpack, the bag is finished with embroidery craftsmanship, retro style is no less than the old style~ can be used as a couple's item, large capacity, light weight, practical and good-looking ~ Perfectly presented with exquisite embroidery craftsmanship, rich retro artistic atmosphere, bold and stylish overall. The self-weight is not heavy at all, adding an artistic touch to the whole look. Dimensions: 35x15x42cm
Code: 6104
